title_link: News - John Silver recovered his broken leg and returned to his job, Deathsoft continues to reverse engineer the schematics of 1818VG93 disk controller using microphotographs, Hippiman/Conscience has translated his PC game Dizzy Rescues, vBv has released his famous collection of ZX Spectrum software
title_h1: ACNews 65 - News - John Silver recovered his broken leg and returned to his job, Deathsoft continues to reverse engineer the schematics of 1818VG93 disk controller using microphotographs, Hippiman/Conscience has translated his PC game Dizzy Rescues, vBv has released his famous collection of ZX Spectrum software
